Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Nicholas Ranallo, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Yan Song,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Zhang Yanlin,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court Granted Plaintiff's Oral Motion to dismiss Defendant Xie Yinzhong only.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant Zhang Yanlin as follows:
Damages: $0
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $0
Total Judgment in the amount of $0

The registrars of record for the domain names listed in Exhibit A of the First Amended Complaint are hereby directed to transfer possession of the domain names to Plaintiff.

Judgment signed in open court.
